title: Sith energy shield
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Sithenergyshield.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Canderous Ordo]] protected by a Sith energy shield]]
A '''[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] energy shield''' was a compact, forearm-mounted [[Personal energy shield/Legends|personal shield]] generator that offered some protection against energy-based weapons. The Sith version improved upon standard [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] issue arm shields by increasing efficiency and offering moderate protection against sonic weapons.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
